programme.title: Resident Evil: Apocalypse
programme.desc: After escaping from the Racoon City Medical Facility Alice searches for answers to the T-Virus and how to contain it, all while trying to find a way to escape the ruined city with fellow survivors.

programme.title: Passengers (2016)
programme.desc: Jennifer Lawrence and Chris Pratt star in an adventure about two passengers traveling to a new planet when their spaceship malfunctions.

programme.title: Charlie's Angels (2000)
programme.desc: They're beautiful, they're brilliant and they work for Charlie.

programme.title: Charlie's Angels: Full Throttle
programme.desc: The Angels (Cameron Diaz, Drew Barrymore & Lucy Liu) go head-to-head with Angel-Gone-Bad!

programme.title: Resident Evil: Extinction
programme.desc: Milla Jovovich is back to kill more zombies in the third chapter of the hit Resident Evil franchise! An action/horror film filled with huge special effects and edge-of-your-seat terror! Survivors of the Raccoon City catastrophe travel across the Nevada desert, hoping to make it to Alaska. Alice (Jovovich) joins the caravan and their fight against the evil Umbrella Corp.

programme.title: Lakeview Terrace
programme.desc: A young interracial couple move into their dream home and are increasingly harassed by their next-door neighbor, a tightly wound black LAPD officer. When the couple decides to fight back the feud turns deadly.

programme.title: All The Money in The World
programme.desc: After the kidnapping of John Paul Getty III, in a race against time, his mother works to convince his wealthy grandfather to pay the ransom. Inspired by historical events. Certain scenes, characters and dialogue have been fictionalized for dramatic purposes.

programme.title: In the Line of Fire
programme.desc: Clint Eastwood delivers the goods as a veteran Secret Service agent whose shameful secret is known to the serial killer that eludes him.

programme.title: Tears of the Sun
programme.desc: After a West African president's family is assassinated and civil unrest is rampant, a top secret team is deployed to the far reaches of the jungle to rescue a U.S. doctor who is acting as a missionary. She insists the U.S. forces rescue all of her charges. As a result, the group falls under rebel attacks when it is revealed that the son of the deposed West African president is among those being saved.

programme.title: Black Hawk Down
programme.desc: Based on the true story of a war waged in Mogadishu by the high tech Black Hawk helicopters and the US Army Rangers and Deltas.

programme.title: The Patriot (2000)
programme.desc: In 1776 South Carolina, widower Benjamin Martin (Gibson) finds himself thrust into the midst of the American Revolutionary War as he helplessly watches his family being torn apart by the savage forces of the British Redcoats. When his oldest son's wife is ruthlessly killed, and his young son is shot through the back before his eyes, Martin is unable to suppress the soldier within that he tried to bury with his own military past. Unable to remain silent, he recruits a band of unlikely volunteers to take up arms against the British. Fighting to protect his famliy's freedom and his country's independence, Martin discovers the pain of betrayal, the redemption of revenge, and the passion of love.

programme.title: District 9
programme.desc: From producer Peter Jackson and director Neill Blomkamp comes a startlingly original science-fiction thriller where alien refugees, stranded on Earth, are exiled to a slum on the fringes of Johannesburg.

programme.title: Rambo (2008)
programme.desc: Twenty years have passed and John Rambo has retreated to northern Thailand. When a group of human rights missionaries fall into the hands of the Burmese army he sets aside his reluctance for violence and conflict and the Vietnam lethal super soldier re-emerges.

programme.title: Ultraviolet (2006)
programme.desc: Set in the late 21st century, a subculture of humans called Hemophages has emerged who have been genetically modified, giving them enhanced speed, incredible stamina and acute intelligence. To the government's dismay, more and more of the population are being transformed, and they have set out to rid the world of this new subculture that they deem a menace to society. One rogue warrior is bent on protecting her race - and seeking revenge on those who changed her life forever. With fierce fighting skills and chameleon-like abilities, Violet sets out to destroy a government-designed time bomb that will eliminate all Hemophages.

programme.title: Stealth
programme.desc: Deeply ensconced in a top-secret military program, three pilots struggle to bring an artificial intelligence program under control ... before it initiates the next world war.

programme.title: Hellboy
programme.desc: A demon, raised from infancy after being conjured by and rescued from the Nazis, grows up to become a defender against the forces of darkness.

programme.title: Gattaca
programme.desc: Ethan Hawke and Uma Thurman star in this futuristic sci-fi thriller about a world where genetic engineering is used to perfect the human species.

programme.title: Hancock
programme.desc: There are heroes--there are superheroes--and then there's Hancock. With great power comes great responsibility--everyone knows that--everyone, that is, but Hancock. Edgy, conflicted, sarcastic, and misunderstood, Hancock's well-intentioned heroics might get the job done and save countless lives, but always seem to leave jaw-dropping damage in their wake. The public has finally had enough--as grateful as they are to have their local hero, the good citizens of Los Angeles are wondering what they ever did to deserve this guy. Hancock isn't the kind of man who cares what other people think--until the day that he saves the life of PR executive Ray Embrey, and the sardonic superhero begins to realize that he may have a vulnerable side after all. Facing that will be Hancock's greatest challenge yet--and a task that may prove impossible as Ray's wife, Mary, insists that he's a lost cause.

programme.title: Second In Command
programme.desc: A former Navy SEAL tries to stop an army of well-armed insurgents from killing their country's president, who's taken refuge within the American embassy.

programme.title: Tears of the Sun
programme.desc: After a West African president's family is assassinated and civil unrest is rampant, a top secret team is deployed to the far reaches of the jungle to rescue a U.S. doctor who is acting as a missionary. As a result, the group falls under rebel attacks when it is revealed that the son of the deposed West African president is among those being saved.

programme.title: The Guardian
programme.desc: A pair of homeless teenagers seeks help in getting married and keeping their baby; Nick runs the risk of botching an important deal that Burton hoped would prove he can be trusted with the firm.

programme.title: The Guardian
programme.desc: Burton's decision to bring in a powerful former state senator and his aide into the firm stuns Nick.

programme.title: The Guardian
programme.desc: Burton's confirmation to the federal bench leaves Nick facing some tough decisions about his future.

programme.title: The Guardian
programme.desc: A drug addicted mother takes her baby hostage in an effort to keep the infant from being taken away.

programme.title: The Guardian
programme.desc: As James represents a nephew being tried for the shooting death of his mom's abusive boyfriend, Nick's plans to make his feelings about Lulu clear are sidetracked by some unexpected arrivals.

programme.title: The Guardian
programme.desc: Nick and Lulu square off over the adoption that will split up two brothers; Jake struggles to find a way to keep his parents from losing their house.

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: Trying to put the memories of his deadly mission to Point Blanc behind him, Alex takes a holiday on the Cornish coast. But when an old foe resurfaces, Alex finds himself dragged back into the world of spycraft.

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: Determined to track down Alan Blunt and warn him, Alex unknowingly puts himself on a collision course with the Department who are simultaneously hunting a dangerous cyber-terrorist. But are the two cases more related than either side realise?

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: Alex refuses to walk away from his investigation into the attack on Ed Pleasance, and with Sabina and Tom's help discovers a new lead connecting it to the Pentagon hack, putting him in the crosshairs of Smoking Mirror.

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: Alex must infiltrate a prestigious event if he's to learn more about the mysterious phenomenon that is the video game Feathered Serpent and its coming sequel, confronting the charismatic billionaire behind it, Damian Cray.

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: To unlock the secrets of Feathered Serpent 2, Alex seeks expert assistance from an old friend. But with his own investigation spiraling out of control, how long before Blunt puts a stop to Alex's dangerous inference?

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: Alex, Tom and Kyra journey to Amsterdam, to infiltrate the heart of Damian Cray's operation, while the Department turn their scrutiny on Cray's forthcoming meeting with the President of the United States.

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: To escape Amsterdam and deliver vital evidence to the Department, Alex needs Jack's help - putting her career in jeopardy. But with the US President's touchdown in the UK already underway, is Alex too late to stop Cray?

programme.title: Alex Rider

programme.title: Alex Rider

programme.title: Alex Rider

programme.title: Alex Rider

programme.title: Alex Rider

Sent to protect Sarah is Kyle Reese (Michael Biehn), who divulges the coming of Skynet, an artificial intelligence system that will spark a nuclear holocaust. Sarah is targeted because Skynet knows that her unborn son will lead the fight against them. With the virtually unstoppable Terminator in hot pursuit, she and Kyle attempt to escape.

programme.desc: When new DNA evidence leads to Springsteen and Scott's release, the victims' families must grapple with the unknown.

programme.desc: In the decade since his fiancée was killed, an Army Ranger, Green Beret and Navy SEAL rolled into one has sworn off fighting crime, preferring instead to rock his mullet as a man of peace. But when his sworn enemy, Dieter Von Cunth, steals a nuclear warhead, only MacGruber and his crack team of experts are equal to the task of bringing the villain to justice.

programme.title: Game Night
programme.desc: Max and Annie's weekly game night gets kicked up a notch when Max's brother Brooks arranges a murder mystery party -- complete with fake thugs and federal agents. So when Brooks gets kidnapped, it's all supposed to be part of the game. As the competitors set out to solve the case, they start to learn that neither the game nor Brooks are what they seem to be. The friends soon find themselves in over their heads as each twist leads to another unexpected turn over the course of one chaotic night.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: Maybe every mistake Rue made led her to the right place after all.

programme.title: Get Him to the Greek
programme.desc: An ambitious executive at a record company, Aaron Green (Jonah Hill) gets what looks like an easy assignment: He must escort British rock legend Aldous Snow (Russell Brand) to L.A.'s Greek Theatre for the first stop on a lucrative comeback-concert tour. Snow, however, has different plans. Learning his true love is in California, the rocker vows to win her back before starting the tour, forcing Aaron to pull out all the stops to get Snow on stage in time.

programme.title: Bad Education
programme.desc: A Long Island school superintendent and his assistant are credited with bringing the district unprecedented prestige. Frank is a master of positive messaging, whether before an audience of community leaders or in an office with a concerned student or parent. That changes when a student reporter uncovers an embezzlement scheme of epic proportions, prompting Frank to devise an elaborate cover-up.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: Maybe every mistake Rue made led her to the right place after all.

programme.title: Paterno
programme.desc: Penn State football coach Joe Paterno becomes embroiled in a sexual abuse scandal.

programme.title: 38 at the Garden
programme.desc: Point guard Jeremy Lin, an undrafted Harvard graduate, shocks fans, stuns his teammates and galvanizes Asians around the world during his landmark 2011-12 season with the New York Knicks and sparks the "Linsanity" craze.

programme.title: US Against the World: Four Years with the Men's National Soccer Team
programme.desc: A disappointing group-stage exit at the 2024 Copa América triggers Berhalter's firing and raises questions about the state of the USMNT.

programme.title: Mountainhead
programme.desc: Four friends reunite during worldwide economic turmoil.

programme.title: Ramy Youssef: In Love
programme.desc: Ramy playfully engages with the audience as he approaches a vast spectrum of personal topics, both hilariously relatable and genuinely serious, all while doing so with the belief that you can find light and hope in all things if you just try to see them through a lens of love. Whether it's his marriage, being a dog parent, AI, or religion, Ramy comes at everything with his own brand of heart and humor.

programme.title: MacGruber
programme.desc: In the decade since his fiancée was killed, an Army Ranger, Green Beret and Navy SEAL rolled into one has sworn off fighting crime, preferring instead to rock his mullet as a man of peace. But when his sworn enemy, Dieter Von Cunth, steals a nuclear warhead, only MacGruber and his crack team of experts are equal to the task of bringing the villain to justice.

programme.title: Paddington 2

One fine day, he spots a pop-up book in an antique shop -- the perfect present for his beloved aunt's 100th birthday. When a thief steals the prized book, Paddington embarks on an epic quest to unmask the culprit before Aunt Lucy's big celebration.

programme.title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
programme.desc: When an interdimensional rupture unravels reality, an unlikely hero must channel her newfound powers to fight bizarre and bewildering dangers from the multiverse.

programme.title: Girls Trip

Along the way, they rekindle their sisterhood and rediscover their wild side by doing enough dancing, drinking, brawling and romancing to make the Big Easy blush.

programme.title: US Against the World: Four Years with the Men's National Soccer Team
programme.desc: A disappointing group-stage exit at the 2024 Copa América triggers Berhalter's firing and raises questions about the state of the USMNT.

programme.title: One Battle After Another
programme.desc: Bob is a washed-up revolutionary who lives in a state of stoned paranoia, surviving off-grid with his spirited and self-reliant daughter, Willa. When his evil nemesis resurfaces and Willa goes missing, the former radical scrambles to find her as both father and daughter battle the consequences of their pasts.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Across the Spider-Verse
programme.desc: After reuniting with Gwen Stacy, Brooklyn's full-time, friendly neighborhood Spider-Man is catapulted across the Multiverse, where he encounters a team of Spider-People charged with protecting its very existence. However, when the heroes clash on how to handle a new threat, Miles finds himself pitted against the other Spiders. He must soon redefine what it means to be a hero so he can save the people he loves most.

programme.title: The Day the Earth Blew Up: A Looney Tunes Movie
programme.desc: Porky Pig and Daffy Duck become Earth's only hope when their antics at the local bubble-gum factory uncover a secret alien mind-control plot. Faced with cosmic odds, they must save their town and the world while not driving each other totally loony.

programme.title: Flow
programme.desc: Cat is a solitary animal, but as its home is devastated by a great flood, he finds refuge on a boat populated by various species, and will have to team up with them despite their differences.

programme.title: Freaky Tales
programme.desc: An NBA star, a corrupt cop, a female rap duo, teenage punks, neo-Nazis and a debt collector embark on a collision course in 1987 Oakland, Calif.

programme.title: Girls Trip
programme.desc: Best friends Ryan, Sasha, Lisa and Dina are in for the adventure of a lifetime when they travel to New Orleans for the annual Essence Festival. Along the way, they rekindle their sisterhood and rediscover their wild side by doing enough dancing, drinking, brawling and romancing to make the Big Easy blush.

programme.title: Atomic Blonde
programme.desc: Sensual and savage, Lorraine Broughton is the most elite spy in MI6, an agent who's willing to use all of her lethal skills to stay alive during an impossible mission. With the Berlin Wall about to fall, she travels into the heart of the city to retrieve a priceless dossier and take down a ruthless espionage ring. Once there, she teams up with an embedded station chief to navigate her way through the deadliest game of spies.

programme.title: Half Man
programme.desc: When Niall's estranged brother Ruben shows up at his wedding, it leads to an explosion of violence that catapults us back through their lives, from the eighties to the present day.

programme.title: Saltburn
programme.desc: A student is invited to an eccentric classmate's estate for an exciting summer.

programme.title: Hidden Figures

programme.title: US Against the World: Four Years with the Men's National Soccer Team

programme.title: All the Way
programme.desc: President Lyndon B. Johnson (Bryan Cranston) endures a tumultuous first year in office while trying to launch a civil rights bill.

programme.title: "Wuthering Heights"
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes when Heathcliff falls in love with Catherine Earnshaw, a woman from a wealthy family in 18th-century England.

programme.title: Ramy Youssef: In Love
programme.desc: Ramy playfully engages with the audience as he approaches a vast spectrum of personal topics, both hilariously relatable and genuinely serious, all while doing so with the belief that you can find light and hope in all things if you just try to see them through a lens of love. Whether it's his marriage, being a dog parent, AI, or religion, Ramy comes at everything with his own brand of heart and humor.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: Maybe every mistake Rue made led her to the right place after all.

programme.title: Hidden Figures

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The War of the Rohirrim
programme.desc: A sudden attack by Wulf, a ruthless Dunlending lord, forces Helm Hammerhand and his people to make a daring last stand in the ancient stronghold of the Hornburg. Finding herself in an increasingly desperate situation, Helm's daughter, Héra, must lead the resistance against a deadly enemy who's intent on total destruction.

programme.title: Boys Go to Jupiter
programme.desc: Billy 5000, a teenage gig worker with a rise-and-grind mindset, aims to make $5,000. His quest is derailed by a gelatinous alien's appearance.

programme.title: Architecton
programme.desc: A hypnotic, propulsive odyssey through the foundations of the modern world, following mountains as they are turned into concrete and buildings as they are turned into rubble.

programme.title: Greenland 2: Migration
programme.desc: In the aftermath of a comet strike that decimated most of the planet, the Garrity family must leave the safety of their Greenland bunker to traverse a shattered world in search of a new home.

programme.title: Too Big to Fail
programme.desc: Financial leaders (William Hurt, Billy Crudup) spring into action when the U.S. economy falters in 2008.

programme.title: Twister
programme.desc: During the approach of the most powerful storm in decades, university professor Dr. Jo Harding (Helen Hunt) and an underfunded team of students prepares the prototype for Dorothy, a ground-breaking tornado data-gathering device conceived by her estranged husband, Bill (Bill Paxton). When Harding tells Bill that Dorothy is ready for testing -- and that their privately funded rival Dr. Jonas Miller (Cary Elwes) has stolen the idea and built his own -- Bill rejoins the team for one last mission.

programme.title: Rooster
programme.desc: Writer Greg Russo arrives at Ludlow College to support his daughter Katie as her marriage begins to implode.

programme.title: Rooster
programme.desc: When Katie's future at Ludlow is thrown into question, Walt offers Greg a deal to keep them both on campus.

programme.title: Rooster
programme.desc: Greg navigates his first day as a teacher at Ludlow, Katie deals with being suspended, and Archie assists Sunny in finding an advisor.

programme.title: Rooster
programme.desc: To avoid Walt's party, Greg dedicates himself to a student; with her suspension lifted, Katie considers one-night stands.

programme.title: Rooster
programme.desc: Greg has to deal with his ex-wife visiting the campus; Katie grows closer to Archie and Dylan thrives in his role.

programme.title: Rooster
programme.desc: While relishing in his new fling, Greg offers Tommy a place to crash; Katie confronts the student behind some personal campus graffiti; Dylan impresses Walt in her new role; Sunny wrestles with a prestigious job offer.

programme.title: Rooster
programme.desc: Greg, Cristle, and Tommy attempt a return to normalcy, Archie meets Sunny's father; Walt makes Dylan an unsatisfactory new offer.

programme.title: Rooster
programme.desc: While Greg tries to support an increasingly emotional Katie, Dylan attempts to steer a promising student towards poetry; Sunny is delighted when Archie starts to engage more with her pregnancy.

programme.title: Rooster
programme.desc: Greg motivates the hockey team before a game, Katie focuses on her internship, and Archie gets feedback on his book.

programme.title: Rooster
programme.desc: After setting boundaries with her parents, Katie makes a decision about her marriage to Archie, who has his own talk with Sunny about the future; then, as he grapples with Katie's independence, Greg prepares to say goodbye to his semester.

programme.title: The Comeback
programme.desc: Valerie is offered a role on a new multi-camera comedy; stoked that sitcoms are on a comeback, she accepts, but is shocked to discover that the show is being written by artificial intelligence.

programme.title: Aliens vs. Predator: Requiem
programme.desc: Residents (Steven Pasquale, Reiko Aylesworth, John Ortiz) of Gunnison, Colorado, are caught up in the crossfire when two deadly extraterrestrial species bring their longstanding conflict to Earth. On the one side, nearly indestructible Aliens; on the other, a lone Predator whose mission is to wipe out all traces of the Alien infestation from Earth, no matter who gets in the way.

programme.title: Prometheus
programme.desc: The discovery of a clue to mankind's origins on Earth leads a team of explorers to the darkest parts of the universe. Two brilliant young scientists lead the expedition. Shaw hopes that they will meet a race of benevolent, godlike beings who will in some way verify her religious beliefs, while Holloway is out to debunk any spiritual notions. However, neither the scientists nor their shipmates are prepared for the unimaginable terrors that await them.

programme.title: Alien: Covenant
programme.desc: Bound for a remote planet on the far side of the galaxy, members (Katherine Waterston, Billy Crudup) of the colony ship Covenant discover what they think to be an uncharted paradise. While there, they meet David (Michael Fassbender), the synthetic survivor of the doomed Prometheus expedition. The mysterious world soon turns dark and dangerous when a hostile alien life-form forces the crew into a deadly fight for survival.

programme.title: Alien: Romulus
programme.desc: Space colonizers come face to face with the most terrifying life-form in the universe while scavenging the deep ends of a derelict space station.

programme.title: Uncut Gems
programme.desc: A charismatic jeweler makes a high-stakes bet that could lead to the windfall of a lifetime. In a precarious high-wire act, he must balance business, family and adversaries on all sides in pursuit of the ultimate win.

programme.title: The Suicide Squad
programme.desc: The government sends the most dangerous supervillains in the world -- Bloodsport, Peacemaker, King Shark, Harley Quinn and others -- to the remote, enemy-infused island of Corto Maltese. Armed with high-tech weapons, they trek through the dangerous jungle on a search-and-destroy mission, with only Col. Rick Flag on the ground to make them behave.

programme.title: How We Get Free
programme.desc: Over the course of two years, Elisabeth Epps works to end cash bail on all fronts, from bailing people out of jail to running for office as one of the first abolitionist candidates in Colorado.

programme.title: Finding the Way Home
programme.desc: The stories of eight children who have been reunited with family members or placed in loving foster homes after being exposed to the distressing conditions prevalent in orphanages and institutions around the world.

programme.title: Stopping The Steal
programme.desc: An inside account of President Trump's challenge to the results of the 2020 presidential election as told by former White House staff and appointees.

programme.title: The Fate of the Furious
programme.desc: With Dom and Letty married, Brian and Mia retired and the rest of the crew exonerated, the globe-trotting team has found some semblance of a normal life. They soon face an unexpected challenge when a woman named Cipher forces Dom to betray them all. They must unite to bring home the man who made them a family and stop Cipher from unleashing chaos.

programme.title: The Conjuring
programme.desc: In 1970, paranormal investigators and demonologists Lorraine (Vera Farmiga) and Ed (Patrick Wilson) Warren are summoned to the home of Carolyn (Lili Taylor) and Roger (Ron Livingston) Perron. The Perrons and their five daughters have recently moved into a secluded farmhouse, where a supernatural presence has made itself known. Though the manifestations are relatively benign at first, events soon escalate in horrifying fashion, especially after the Warrens discover the house's macabre history.

programme.title: The Conjuring 2
programme.desc: In 1977, paranormal investigators Ed (Patrick Wilson) and Lorraine Warren come out of a self-imposed sabbatical to travel to Enfield, a borough in north London. There, they meet Peggy Hodgson, an overwhelmed single mother of four who tells the couple that something evil is in her home. Ed and Lorraine believe her story when the youngest daughter starts to show signs of demonic possession. As the Warrens try to help the besieged girl, they become the next targets of the malicious spirit.

programme.title: The Conjuring: The Devil Made Me Do It
programme.desc: Paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren take on one of the most sensational cases of their careers after a cop stumbles upon a dazed and bloodied young man walking down the road. Accused of murder, the suspect claims demonic possession as his defense, forcing the Warrens into a supernatural inquiry unlike anything they've ever seen before.

programme.title: The Conjuring: Last Rites
programme.desc: In 1986 paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren travel to Pennsylvania to vanquish a demon from a family's home.

programme.title: Men
programme.desc: Harper retreats to the countryside to be alone in the wake of a tragedy, but her unease at the town's leering and uncannily similar men grows into a fully fledged nightmare as her arrival awakens something primal in the forest.

programme.title: Materialists
programme.desc: A young, ambitious New York City matchmaker finds herself torn between the perfect match and her imperfect ex.

programme.title: Friendship
programme.desc: A suburban dad falls hard for his new neighbor.

programme.title: Game Night
programme.desc: Max and Annie's weekly game night gets kicked up a notch when Max's brother Brooks arranges a murder mystery party -- complete with fake thugs and federal agents. So when Brooks gets kidnapped, it's all supposed to be part of the game. As the competitors set out to solve the case, they start to learn that neither the game nor Brooks are what they seem to be. The friends soon find themselves in over their heads as each twist leads to another unexpected turn over the course of one chaotic night.

programme.title: Wedding Crashers
programme.desc: Jeremy (Vince Vaughn) and John (Owen Wilson) are divorce mediators who spend their free time crashing wedding receptions. For the irrepressible duo, there are few better ways to drink for free and bed vulnerable women. So when Secretary of the Treasury William Cleary (Christopher Walken) announces the wedding of his daughter, the pair make it their mission to crash the high-profile event. But their game hits a bump in the road when John locks eyes with bridesmaid Claire (Rachel McAdams).

programme.title: Crazy, Stupid, Love.
programme.desc: Cal Weaver (Steve Carell) is living the American dream. He has a good job, a beautiful house, great children and a beautiful wife, named Emily (Julianne Moore). Cal's seemingly perfect life unravels, however, when he learns that Emily has been unfaithful and wants a divorce. Over 40 and suddenly single, Cal is adrift in the fickle world of dating. Enter, Jacob Palmer (Ryan Gosling), a self-styled player who takes Cal under his wing and teaches him how to be a hit with the ladies.

programme.title: Zola
programme.desc: Zola, a Detroit waitress, is seduced into a weekend of stripping in Florida for some quick cash -- but the trip becomes a sleepless 48-hour odyssey involving a nefarious friend, her pimp and her idiot boyfriend.

programme.title: The A List: 15 Stories From Asian and Pacific Diasporas
programme.desc: A tapestry of personal vignettes from across the Asian American, Native Hawaiian and Pacific Islander, also known as the AANHPI, communities in America.

programme.title: Billy Joel: And So It Goes
programme.desc: After the success of "Piano Man," Billy Joel's career takes off with a string international hits and record-breaking tours.

programme.title: Billy Joel: And So It Goes
programme.desc: Through countless setbacks, Joel reinvents himself with a return to his roots and a residency at Madison Square Garden.

programme.title: Twilight
programme.desc: High-school student Bella Swan, always a bit of a misfit, doesn't expect life to change much when she moves from sunny Arizona to rainy Washington state. Then she meets Edward Cullen, a handsome but mysterious teen whose eyes seem to peer directly into her soul. Edward is a vampire whose family does not drink blood, and Bella, far from being frightened, enters into a dangerous romance with her immortal soulmate.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: New Moon
programme.desc: After the abrupt departure of Edward, her vampire love, Bella finds comfort in her deepening friendship with Jacob Black. However, Bella's loyalties are put to the test as she becomes drawn into the world of werewolves, ancient enemies of vampires.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: Eclipse
programme.desc: Danger once again surrounds Bella, as a string of mysterious killings terrorizes Seattle and a malicious vampire continues her infernal quest for revenge. Amid the tumult, Bella must choose between her love for Edward and her friendship with Jacob, knowing that her decision may ignite the long-simmering feud between vampire and werewolf.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn Part 1
programme.desc: At last, Bella and Edward are getting married. When Jacob finds out that Bella wants to spend her honeymoon as a human, he is horrified, for Edward's passion could accidentally kill her. Bella does indeed survive her honeymoon, but a new complication arises when she discovers that she's pregnant, and the child is growing at an alarming rate. The pregnancy sets the wolves against Bella and Edward, but Jacob vows to protect his friend.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn Part 2
programme.desc: Bella awakes, as a vampire, from her life-threatening labor, and her newborn daughter, Renesmee, proves to be very special indeed. While Bella adjusts to her new state of being, Renesmee experiences accelerated growth. When the Volturi learn of the baby's existence, they declare her to be an abomination and sentence the Cullens to death. Bella, Edward and the rest of the clan seek help from allies around the world to protect their family.

programme.title: I Love You Forever
programme.desc: Following a young woman into and out of an emotionally abusive relationship.

programme.title: Black Adam
programme.desc: In ancient Kahndaq, Teth Adam was bestowed the almighty powers of the gods. After using these powers for vengeance, he was imprisoned, becoming Black Adam. Nearly 5,000 years have passed, and Black Adam has gone from man to myth to legend. Now free, his unique form of justice, born out of rage, is challenged by modern-day heroes who form the Justice Society: Hawkman, Dr. Fate, Atom Smasher and Cyclone.

programme.title: Dr. Seuss' The Cat in the Hat
programme.desc: In this live-action film based on the favorite children's tale, the trouble-making Cat in the Hat (Mike Myers) arrives at the home of bored young Sally Walden (Dakota Fanning) and her brother, Conrad (Spencer Breslin), while their mother (Kelly Preston) is out. The family's pet fish (Sean Hayes) objects to the Cat's presence, but that doesn't stop the hat-wearing giant feline from trying to have fun, no matter how much destruction is left in his wake.

programme.title: Mom and Dad Save the World
programme.desc: While planning to destroy Earth with a gigantic laser beam, Emperor Tod Spengo (Jon Lovitz), ruler of the planet Spengo, catches a glimpse of housewife Marge Nelson (Teri Garr) and becomes smitten with her. Beaming Marge and her husband, Dick (Jeffrey Jones), up to Spengo from California, the daft, dimwitted leader tries to woo her, and sends her spouse to prison. Soon Dick is plotting an insurgency, in hopes of overthrowing Spengo and rescuing his wife.

programme.title: Mondays at Racine
programme.desc: On the third Monday of every month, two sisters open their Long Island hair salon to women diagnosed with cancer.

programme.title: Here to Climb
programme.desc: Sasha DiGiulian rises from child prodigy to a champion sport climber, as she ultimately makes her mark by taking her talents to big walls with a series of first female ascents.

programme.title: The Brutalist
programme.desc: Escaping postwar Europe, a visionary architect arrives in America to rebuild his life. On his own in a strange new country, a wealthy industrialist recognizes his talent -- but power and legacy comes at a heavy cost.

programme.title: Greenland
programme.desc: John Garrity, his estranged wife and their young son embark on a perilous journey to find sanctuary as a planet-killing comet hurtles toward Earth. Amid terrifying accounts of cities getting leveled, the family experiences the best and worst in humanity. As the countdown to the global apocalypse approaches zero, their incredible trek culminates in a desperate, last-minute flight to a possible safe haven.

programme.title: Moonlight
programme.desc: A look at three defining chapters in the life of Chiron, a young black man growing up in Miami. His epic journey to manhood is guided by the kindness, support and love of the community that helps raise him.

programme.title: Beetlejuice Beetlejuice
programme.desc: Still haunted by Beetlejuice, Lydia's life gets turned upside down when her daughter discovers a portal to the afterlife. When someone says Beetlejuice's name three times, the mischievous demon returns to unleash his very own brand of mayhem.

programme.title: Weeds

programme.title: Weeds

programme.title: Grace and Frankie
programme.desc: Grace & Frankie imagine what their lives would be like if they hadn't lived together for the last three years.

programme.title: Grace and Frankie
programme.desc: Frankie is stunned by Grace's news, but she buries her feelings -- until everyone gathers together.

programme.title: Divergent
programme.desc: In a world divided by factions based on virtues, Tris learns she's Divergent and won't fit in.

programme.title: The Divergent Series: Insurgent

programme.desc: Comedy series providing an honest, uplifting and heart-warming portrayal of the lives of working-class teenagers from Liverpool while tackling issues with a refreshing humour. Reece is inspired by Christopher to try to track down the dad that he has never met - desperate to understand his family history and to shed some light on why he is the way he is, he asks Jodie to reveal his dad's identity. When she tells him that his name is Disneyland Darren, Christopher has Reece's back every step of the way in the search for his dad - when they do eventually track him down, his identity is a huge shock and Reece is left to wonder if this is a relationship that he wants to pursue. Meanwhile, Aimee and Mia-Louise fall out as Aimee is worried that Ziad is scamming Mia-Louise for money - Mia-Louise bites back by telling her that she's embarrassing herself by being interested in Christopher as he isn't interested in 'girls like her'. Keen to prove the other wrong, the girls' feud intensifies...

programme.desc: Reality series following Princess Andre, the daughter of Peter Andre and Katie Price. Princess feels the pressure building as she faces life-changing decisions - unsure about moving out, she visits a financial adviser who addresses her spending habits. Elsewhere, Princess puts her foot down in an important meeting after some sleepless nights, visits a choreographer in pursuit of a singing career, and discusses mums' online careers with friend Heidi Katona while visiting a mud spa - she also discusses the downsides of fame after a backlash following a social post featuring her mum Katie. As Princess approaches the milestone of a million followers, she decides to help Junior with his socials - and it appears he needs all the help he can get - then heads on her first-ever girls' trip to Dubai with friend Sofia in a bid to escape the stress. Princess plans to go skydiving on her search for adrenaline, but she has second thoughts about jumping after seeking advice from her mum.

programme.title: The Only Way is Essex
programme.desc: Essex's finest head to Southend as the drama steps up a gear in the final episode of the series. With two suitors vying for her affections, Shelby's feeling torn. Tom's ultimatum couldn't have been clearer: stop flirting with Sam or they're done. But it's a tough decision to make; Tom's a lovely guy, but there's no denying the chemistry she has with badboy Mr Mucklow. With the pressure mounting on her, which boy will reign triumphant in the battle for Shelby's heart?

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City
programme.desc: US reality series peeking inside the unconventional lives of six successful women living in or around Salt Lake City, Utah. The women of Salt Lake City return as Heather wants to get everyone together for a fresh start - Whitney's public comments about Meredith put a strain on their already fragile friendship, Angie introduces her friend Monica to the ladies, and Lisa struggles with her son Jack's decision to go on a Mormon mission.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New Jersey

programme.title: Ant & Dec's Limitless Win
programme.desc: Life-changing money is on the line as Ant and Dec welcome two new pairs to the Limitless Ladder - first there's Tegan and Paul, who are playing for some life-changing goals: an early retirement for Paul, a new house for Tegan, and treats for the whole family as they try to navigate the ups and downs of the ladder without crashing out. Football teammates and kindred spirits Abbi and Amy then take their shot - Amy has her heart set on travelling the world and they'll need a big win to make it happen as they try to climb to the top without dashing their dreams with an empty-handed crash-out.

programme.desc: Have you ever wondered how clever you are? This is your chance to find out as comedy legend Lee Mack presents the ultimate leveller of a quiz show - it doesn't matter if you're not usually good at quizzes because the questions have nothing to do with remembering facts and are all about logic and common sense. This is the quiz that the whole family can play together - 100 contestants begin every show and try to make it to the end to answer a question that only one per cent of the country can get right and win up to 100,000 pounds.

programme.title: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days
programme.desc: Romantic comedy. Unbeknownst to him, the chosen target, journalist Andie Anderson, is running her own experiment: she's determined to drive a man away in ten days to prove a point to her editor and earn the chance to write more meaningful stories. Will either party succeed with a hidden agenda in each camp?

programme.title: Grace
programme.desc: As Grace's team recovers from recent distressing events, they are called to the scene of an awful car accident when a local hotelier is killed by an oncoming driver who cruelly flees the site of the crash and leaves him to die - as Roy tackles what may prove to be one of his most complex cases yet, DC Vee Wilde faces a challenge of her own when she comes face to face with her estranged father after many years. Meanwhile, Grace's life takes a devastating turn as his wedding to Cleo draws near...

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Crime drama. Now living away from home, Esme visits the Keatings one morning with her friend Mae to bring some washing round - Geordie is happy to see Esme and tries to put a positive spin on things, but Cathy is not best pleased. Later that morning, Geordie and Cathy are confronted by their worst fears when they hear of a young woman's death at Esme's office - it turns out to be Mae, who has died from anaphylaxis following an allergic reaction. Medical results reveal that Mae had an allergy to almonds - it had been Mae's birthday that day and Geordie speculates that it could've been her birthday cake that was the cause of the allergic reaction, but when the test results show up negative, a mystery emerges around how Mae ingested almonds. It becomes apparent that someone had done this purposefully with the intention of murdering Mae, but why would someone want to kill a young woman like this? Meanwhile, Alphy is eager to update the Bishop on the hard work he's been doing on the church.

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Crime drama. Geordie and Larry are called out to Marcus Blakely's farm one morning following the discovery of a skeleton in his field - when the skeleton turns out to be that of a Roman soldier, a team of archaeologists arrive soon after to set up a dig site while causing quite a stir in the village. Mrs C hears the news and convinces Alphy and Jack to walk down and take a look - that night sees the lead archaeologist Henry host a talk at the village hall that showcases their findings and further plans for the dig. The next morning dawns with Henry being found dead - and eerily lying in the same spot in which the skeleton was discovered. As Alphy and Geordie investigate Henry and his fellow archaeologists further, they uncover a tangled web of betrayal and deceit, in which no-one is quite who they say they are. Meanwhile, Alphy is still processing the news that he's out of a job and looks for a sign from God about what he should do next - should he give up and leave, or stay and fight?

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Detective drama series. When a rape and murder case goes to trial, DCI Gill Murray is determined to see defendant Georgios Stelikos convicted, but the case is made more complicated because only one of the alleged victims is prepared to testify. When Rachel gives evidence, she is horrified to discover that her ex Nick is the defence barrister. Nick's cross-examination shakes her when he uses information which passed between them when they were together, but events take a shocking turn as the verdict is delivered.

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Detective drama series. Janet's affair with a colleague is also uncovered, but has Rachel overstepped the mark by confronting Janet about it?

programme.desc: DCI Tom Barnaby and DS Ben Jones investigate a land feud involving two farming dynasties which explodes into violence - trouble seems to be brewing in the pretty village of Ford Florey when a tract of waste ground dubbed the Swamp becomes the focus of a land dispute between two old agricultural families. Tensions are increased further after a band of travellers also lay claim to the site with a view to developing it into a place where they can settle - matters come to a head at the town's annual Fayre. While some villagers are taking part in a shootout reconstruction at a Wild West show, a woman is shot for real - she turns out to be the farm manager for one of the feuding families and the timing of her death raises questions. Barnaby and Jones launch a murder investigation and uncover a series of seething grudges within the village before another person is killed - does the Swamp hold the key to identifying the murderer?

programme.desc: The first of two compelling final chapters in the crime drama starring Brenda Blethyn as DCI Vera Stanhope bids farewell. Vera nets two cases when an ex-prisoner's body is discovered on the banks of the Tyne - has our former inmate been served cold justice, or does his death run deeper?

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Crime drama. Geordie arrives at the vicarage to ask for Alphy's help with the case of a missing woman - when Alphy sees a picture of her, he is stunned to discover that it's a woman he met in a bar recently who introduced herself as Petra. It turns out that Petra's real name is Caroline Stansham - her father says that she's been missing for weeks and that means that Alphy could be one of the last people to have seen her. When Geordie and Alphy learn that Caroline had been writing for a student newspaper and track down the paper's office, it turns out to be a converted dorm room occupied by aspiring satirists Innes and Nigel. After hitting a dead end, the pair are shocked to learn that Innes has been brutally murdered in his room - how could this have happened, and does it have anything to do with Caroline's disappearance? Meanwhile, Leonard grows concerned over Sam's increasing inﬂuence over Daniel, and Geordie is shocked to find some mood-controlling pills that Cathy has been taking.

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Crime drama. It's Sunday morning and Alphy is preparing for the arrival of the new vicar David - when David then railroads Alphy's service and delivers a pompous and uninspiring sermon to the congregation, Alphy slips out and catches a woman with a pram posting a letter to the vicarage. Alphy opens the letter and sees that it is another Bible page with the words 'Why have you given up?' scrawled on it - meanwhile, Geordie and Larry are called out to investigate the death of a man called Fred Eccles on the streets of Cambridge. When the detectives speak to Fred's landlord Connie, they learn that he was a reclusive man who spent most of his time painting miniature soldiers and whose only real contact was with the people in his church group The Way Finders - as Alphy, Geordie and the rest of the team race against the clock to uncover the truth, they are confronted with a shocking and terrifying revelation that puts Daniel and the fellow Way Finders in grave danger.

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: The detective drama series continues. When Rachel bumps into an ex-juror, she is shocked to discover that the woman had an affair with Nick in the middle of a trial. A desperately worried Nick does everything in his power to persuade Rachel to keep the knowledge to herself. Meanwhile, after a current investigation throws up similarities to Veronica's murder, Janet tells Geoff Hastings that they could be one step closer to bringing his sister's killer to justice. However, when Rachel stumbles across some new facts in the case, she realises that Janet is in terrible danger. Can she get the information to Janet in time?

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Police drama. As Rachel is walking home, she is narrowly missed by a car which then smashes into the side of the road. She then learns that the crash is linked to the disturbing information she found out about Nick's affair with a juror. Was Rachel targeted, and could Nick have had something to do with it? Meanwhile, the latest case for the team is that of a teenager shot dead at home. His best friend witnessed the shooting, but it takes all of Janet's skill to get him to open up because he is terrified that he could be next. As Rachel's career hangs in the balance when Gill discovers just how far she has gone in pursuit of love, Janet needs to end her own affair once and for all.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series about a curmudgeonly GP. An attempt by the Doc to be sociable by inviting the chairman of the school's board of governors to dinner ends in disaster when Martin looks down on both him and his wife for drinking and Louisa is caught badmouthing them on their baby monitor - meanwhile, Martin is dubious about handing James to the couple's new childminder Mel as she is constantly scratching herself. When Martin insists that the new nanny has a medical appointment to diagnose the cause of the itch, he tells her that it is due to an infection which is common in fat people - she is furious and hands in her notice while leaving Martin holding the baby. Elsewhere, Ruth causes PC Penhale to go on a charm offensive after offering him some friendly advice on a phone-in programme on Radio Portwenn, Morwenna is feeling lonely but gets a shock when she decides to advertise for a lodger, and Bert drops a bombshell on Al when he tells him that he has rented out Al's room to tourists.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series about a curmudgeonly GP. Two fisherman wake the Doc and Louisa at the crack of dawn as they have found a man collapsed on the beach - Martin examines the mystery man and learns that his name is Robert Campbell. When Robert realises who is treating him, he starts to probe Martin about his family - the Doc gives Robert some rehydration salts and asks Morwenna to note his details for the results, but Robert disappears before she has the chance to. When Robert then stops dead in his tracks after seeing Ruth, she returns to her car after having a coffee out with Caroline... and finds a red rose on the windscreen that unnerves her. Meanwhile, it's Mike's first day looking after James - but Louisa can't help but check up on him and the baby - and Martin examines a girl who has an upset stomach and blames it on a meal she ate at Bert's restaurant. She has written all about it in an article for the school newspaper - and gone to press without Louisa proofreading it first.

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Crime drama. Alphy is thriving - the beating heart of the parish, he lends an ear to everyone even as they struggle to communicate with each other. He has lined up a programme of celebrations for Easter and the whole village has embraced it - well, most of them, as local Reg sits outside the church protesting with his homemade placard that Christianity is getting too commercialised. Tragedy strikes, however, when a gunshot is heard and Reg is found dead, seemingly having taken his own life - Geordie, though suspects foul play as Reg was seen arguing with his fiance shortly before and something doesn't quite add up about this decorated war hero. Meanwhile, Alphy is getting a reputation for dating most of the girls in the village, love is clearly in the air as Geordie seems to be constantly walking in on Larry and Miss Scott canoodling around the station, Cathy is facing a danger to the workforce at Swinnerton's, and Leonard worries that Daniel will reconcile with his parents.

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Crime drama. The death of a student plunges Geordie and Alphy into a world of academic adversaries where two research groups are racing to prove and publish their newest theses before the other - prestige, fame and a place in the history books are all at stake. With claims of plagiarism, favouritism and cheating being thrown around, it's clear some of these learned fellows can be more immature than the students... across the case, one of the professors is an Indian woman confounded by Alphy, someone who seems to have so little interest in his own heritage and has made himself into an image of quintessential white Britishness. While Alphy, who is normally so cool and self-assured, is a little unnerved by her, he feels surer of himself with Meg until it is revealed that her father is the bishop who tried to have him replaced - elsewhere, Leonard struggles with his father's death in Daniel's absence, and Geordie makes more of an effort to listen to Cathy as her work input is overlooked.

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Drama series following two Manchester police officers. In the first of a two-part story, DCI Gill Murray, DC Janet Scott, DC Rachel Bailey and the team are called in when a badly burned body turns up in remote woodland and is followed a few days later by another. Working alongside the formidable DCI Julie Dodson, the officers realise that the victims were tortured before they were killed. They make an arrest, but when the brother of prime suspect Nadia Hicks is brutally murdered, it becomes clear that their investigation has only scratched the surface. Meanwhile, Rachel's estranged brother Dom arrives on her doorstep, and she does not have the heart to turn him away. Janet also has a guest - her mother Dorothy. Unfortunately, Dorothy winds up Janet's husband Adrian, and it is not long before he packs his bags. At work, Kevin leaps to Rachel's defence when a murder suspect turns violent, but his thunder is stolen by sexy traffic cop Sean.

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Second of a two-part story. The team finally break down the wall of silence maintained by their four murder suspects and uncover the shockingly banal truth behind the killings. Meanwhile, Rachel cannot fight her attraction to Sean, but will she regret her actions? At the same time, Janet tries to keep her private life secret, but Taisie spills the beans to Andy at Rachel's birthday celebrations.

programme.title: Dark Side of the Ring
programme.desc: Documentary series that examines some of the darker stories from the golden age of professional wrestling. Japan's Atsushi Onita creates FMW and some spectacular matches featuring explosions and gratuitous gore, but his handpicked successor takes his own life while drowning in debt.

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series. Ray is assigned to look after the wife of a casino owner who has developed into a compulsive gambler, but Arthur finds himself strangely drawn to her husband's establishment when she explains her latest foolproof system to him.

programme.title: British Touring Car Crashes and Smashes
programme.desc: A short sports film depicting extraordinary British Touring Car crashes and smashes. [S]

programme.title: The Protectors
programme.desc: Adventure series about a European crime-fighting team. Harry and the Contessa are the victims of a car crash which was engineered to get information out of them about a witness that they have been hired to protect.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: The first part of the last-ever episode of the classic US action drama series. Thomas returns to Virginia on holiday and reflects on his life, his marriage to Michelle and his experiences - he also attends a US Navy reunion, meets his grandfather, and learns what became of two former classmates. As Higgins promises to reveal Robin Masters' true identity and Rick prepares to marry Cleo, Thomas is forced into a hasty return to Hawaii when TV reporter Linda Lee Ellison is attacked.

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Invitation to Danger: Drama series about a debonair crime-fighter. The Saint is lured to a sinister country house where a cool blonde poses a dilemma about the risk she poses. [SL,S] S5 Ep29

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: Future Buffy the Vampire Slayer star Anthony Head makes an appearance in this episode of the classic drama starring Michael Elphick. Ken sets out to ride the range on behalf of an eccentric old lady who is being victimised by unsavoury happenings at her farm due to property developers.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Classic '70s police drama series. The years seem to be catching up with Regan when he narrowly escapes serious injury during a pursuit.

programme.title: Battlebots
programme.desc: US robot combat series. It's the opening night of BattleBots VII and all our favourite killer machines and genius teams are back for the number one tournament in robotic sport - the seventh series' World Championship qualifiers kick off with an epic fight card including fancied contenders like Witch Doctor, Ribbot, Quantum and Captain Shrederator, and the climax is a Main Event for the ages as reigning champion Tantrum begins its title defence against Minotaur, the raging bull from Brazil.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: The first part of the pilot episode of the classic US action drama series. Former Naval officer Thomas Magnum's investigation into the suspicious death of an old friend from Vietnam puts him in conflict with the US Navy's hierarchy and makes him the target of cold-blooded killers.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: The concluding part of the pilot episode of the classic US action drama series. Former Naval officer Thomas Magnum continues his mission to find his friend's killers, prove to the Navy that his buddy was not a drug smuggler, and uncover a smuggling ring that leads Thomas to confront people from his past when he fought in the Vietnam War.

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Suave freelance troubleshooter Simon Templar embarks on another case involving action and intrigue. The Saint plays his part in a gangster's plot to trick his four greatest enemies into carrying out a robbery.

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: Classic drama starring Michael Elphick. It's love at first sight when Ken meets Bebe McClintock, the lead singer with a country and western band that Harry has booked.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Classic '70s police drama series. Could a nightmare had by Regan's girlfriend come true, is he really in imminent danger, and who is after him and why?

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series. When their van breaks down, Arthur and Ray take their cargo of dodgy videos onto the glorious waterways of England that is otherwise known as the canal between Willesden and Limehouse - luckily, the barge also turns out to be a convenient hideout from fearsome Bible-quoting Welshman Big Dai...

programme.title: Gallagher PREM Unleashed
programme.desc: Action from the 16th round of fixtures, featuring Northampton v Bristol, Bath v Newcastle, Harlequins v Exeter, Saracens v Gloucester and Sale v Leicester. [S]

programme.title: Tomorrow Never Dies
programme.desc: The 18th entry in the James Bond film series. Media tycoon Elliot Carver is one of the most powerful men in the world - his newspaper Tomorrow is a world leader in that industry, and he is about to launch a satellite network to capitalise on his success. However, he is hungry for more business - especially from the Asian market - and when a British Royal Navy ship is mysteriously sunk in the South China Sea by unknown means and any survivors of the attack are killed afterwards, Tomorrow manages to be first to tell the world that the survivors' bodies were riddled with Chinese bullets. China repeatedly denies any responsibility for the attack, but Admiral Roebuck of the Royal Navy insists that China are to blame. However, M - the venerable boss of MI6 - suspects that there is more to the attack and therefore sends James Bond on a mission to find the real cause behind the sinking of the British ship. Can 007 do so and stop war breaking out between Britain and China?

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series. Arthur is determined that his lads will emerge victorious from the Winchester Club quiz night, but he has a few questions to answer himself when it turns out that the star of the show is an escaped convict.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: US documentary series following salvage experts Mike Wolff and Frank Fritz as they travel around America and the rest of the globe trawling junkyards, garages, attics and barns for precious objects. Mike and Frank travel to North Carolina to explore a set of untouched outbuildings where Mike then has the task of negotiating for a 1950 Studebaker.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: The truckers battle to the last load to determine this year's King of the Haul Road. Tensions between co-leaders Ray and Greg explode on Atigun, giving Hugh a chance to take the lead. Lisa's possible best season ever is on the line, while Jack's hope to repeat as King is in jeopardy. Alex pushes to finally beat his nemesis, the Polar Bear.

programme.title: Hang 'Em High
programme.desc: Rugged western drama. Lawman-turned-rancher Jed Cooper is attacked by a lynch mob and hanged as they believe him to be guilty of cattle rustling and murder when he did not commit either crime - when Jed is rescued before he dies, he returns to his former profession to hunt the mob down but finds that his desire for revenge clashes with his responsibility to bring them to trial alive.
